economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 25x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
strongest_counter_explanation: growth projected without its capital cost
falsifiers: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (High-return compounder). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of GOOGL, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

component_groups.label: Google Services owner cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key primary_operating_segment; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Google Cloud owner cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key secondary_operating_segments; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key strategic_option; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: The range includes delay and failure outcomes; dated cash realization remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

Universal followups remain open until primary evidence supports the ownership map, owner-cash or NAV bridge, and downside/capital claims.
